response: Hi everyone! I'm Alex—I tend to be pretty cooperative and methodical in group settings, so I like to hear everyone out before making decisions. I'm a bit curious by nature, but I usually prefer to keep things balanced and stay calm. Looking forward to working with all of you!

Hey everyone, I'm Gray. I like to stay methodical and hear people out before making any decisions, and I'm pretty calm under pressure. Looking forward to working through this together step by step.

Hey everyone, I'm Kennedy. I'm pretty quiet and observant in groups—I like to think things through before jumping in, and I get a bit anxious when things move too fast. I'll do my best to help us figure this out together.

Hey everyone, I'm Dana! I'm pretty open-minded and love diving into new strategies, so I'm definitely going to speak up and keep things interesting. I trust my instincts but I also want to hear what everyone thinks—let's figure this out together!
